title: End of Evangelion Episodic Version
wikitext:
[]: End of Evangelion: Episodic Version Post by skikes » Sat Jan 25, 2014 7:15 pm Does anyone know where one might get their hands on the episodic version of the end of evangelion released with the laserdisc release of NGE... without actually buying the laserdics... legal or otherwise...

[]: Post by Gorbatschow » Sat Jan 25, 2014 7:16 pm Sorry for asking but: Episodic Version ?

[]: Post by Sephizim » Sat Jan 25, 2014 7:29 pm He means the version released on the R2 DVD KIBA-7, where EoE is presented as two distinct episodes, as opposed to one movie. Details can be found here. And to answer the original question, trust me, a few weeks ago I spent several days trying to locate that version online. Pretty sure it can't be done. I opted to use a Japanese intermediary site to order it for me off of a Japanese website. Unfortunately, I had to buy the whole set, since no one was selling the 7th disc just by itself.

[]: Re: End of Evanelion: Episodic Version Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jan 25, 2014 7:50 pm skikes wrote: without actually buying the laserdics... legal or otherwise...

Article: End of Evangelion Episodic Version
[]: End of Evangelion: Episodic Version Post by skikes » Sat Jan 25, 2014 7:15 pm Does anyone know where one might get their hands on the episodic version of the end of evangelion released with the laserdisc release of NGE... without actually buying the laserdics... legal or otherwise...

[]: Post by Gorbatschow » Sat Jan 25, 2014 7:16 pm Sorry for asking but: Episodic Version ?

[]: Post by Sephizim » Sat Jan 25, 2014 7:29 pm He means the version released on the R2 DVD KIBA-7, where EoE is presented as two distinct episodes, as opposed to one movie. Details can be found here. And to answer the original question, trust me, a few weeks ago I spent several days trying to locate that version online. Pretty sure it can't be done. I opted to use a Japanese intermediary site to order it for me off of a Japanese website. Unfortunately, I had to buy the whole set, since no one was selling the 7th disc just by itself.
